# Household Shopping List

This project was scaffolded by **Meta Prompting**.

Meta Prompting is an AI engineering system that audits repositories, generates backend and frontend code, and prepares production-ready pull requests.

Learn more:
https://meta-prompting.com

## Project Stack

This repository uses the **Laravel TALL**.

Laravel with Blade, Livewire, Alpine, and Tailwind for full-stack product work.

TALL stands for:
- Tailwind CSS
- Alpine.js
- Laravel
- Livewire

## Generated Files

Meta Prompting created the initial scaffold for this repository.

```text
README.md
app/Livewire/.gitkeep
resources/views/components/.gitkeep
resources/views/layouts/app.blade.php
resources/views/livewire/.gitkeep
```

## Getting Started

- `composer install`
- `cp .env.example .env`
- `php artisan key:generate`
- `php artisan migrate`
- `npm install`
- `npm run build`

## Run the application

- `php artisan serve`
- `npm run dev`

## Run tests

- `php artisan test`

## About Meta Prompting

Meta Prompting helps developers describe features and have AI engineers implement them across connected repositories with structured planning, execution, and review flows.
